headline: Intuit (INTU) Valuation Check As Earnings Momentum And FedNow Certification Draw Fresh Attention
summary: Intuit (INTU) has drawn fresh attention after reporting Q2 fiscal 2026 results with double digit revenue growth and rising TurboTax adoption, alongside the completion of Federal Reserve certification for FedNow instant payments across its financial platforms. See our latest analysis for Intuit. Despite the strong Q2 update and FedNow rollout, the share price has been under pressure, with a 30 day share price return of 3.86% and a 1 year total shareholder return decline of 35.23%, pointing to...
